title: Make Ars Lectern Great Again
description: An Ars Nouveau addon that fixes bugs in the Storage Lectern and expands its GUI to make it more convenient to use.
body:
An Ars Nouveau addon that fixes bugs in the Storage Lectern and expands its GUI to make it more convenient to use.  
一个修复存储讲台bug，扩展存储讲台GUI界面使其更便于使用的新生魔艺附属模组。

Expanded the Storage Lectern's GUI size. By default, it now displays 6 rows of items, and 10 rows when the crafting table is closed.  
扩大了存储讲台GUI界面尺寸，现在默认状态下能同时显示6行物品，关掉合成台后能同时显示10行物品。

Disabled the automatic focus on the Storage Lectern's search box, so pressing keys while focused on items will no longer automatically type into the search box (can be re‑enabled via the config file).  
禁用了存储讲台搜索框自动聚焦，对物品按下按键时不会自动输入到搜索框了。（可以修改配置文件重新启用）

Fixed bugs such as scrollbar misalignment and items not updating properly after clicking the collapse button.
修复了滚动条错位，点击折叠按钮后物品不能自动更新等bug。
